tagline: Social fitness. Post workouts, follow athletes, grow together.
termsHint: By continuing you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy.
heroTitle: Share the work. Grow with the community.
heroBody: A social fitness network — post workouts, follow athletes, and get inspired every day. Free to join.
quote: One day or day one. You decide.

onboarding.profileBody: This is how athletes find you. Free forever — no calorie math required.
onboarding.trainBody: Pick up to 5 — we use this for Discover suggestions.
onboarding.unitsBody: Change anytime in Profile. Pro nutrition tools use this later.

intro.title: Everything inside Evolve
intro.subtitle: A quick tour of the tools that keep your nutrition and training on track.

feed.title: Workout Feed
points: Share runs, lifts, yoga, and more

discover.title: Discover Athletes
points: Find people by name or username

free.title: Free forever core
points: Pro is for deeper personal coaching

heroBodyMobile: Post workouts, follow athletes, and train together — free forever.
demoSocialHint: Demo sign-in — real Instagram OAuth comes later. Opens your feed.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.body: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for {{email}}, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

results.title: Your Evolve targets
results.body: Based on your goals and lifestyle, here's a starting framework. These are estimates — you can refine them anytime.
results.disclaimer: These recommendations are estimates generated from the information you provided. Adjust targets as your progress and preferences evolve.
